sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (value String, result Decimal(38, 2)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_decimal (value, result) VALUES ('100.25', toDecimal128OrDefault('100.25', 2));
SELECT value, toDecimal128OrDefault(value, 3, CAST('0', 'Decimal128(3)')) AS converted_value FROM test_decimal;
UPDATE test_decimal SET result = toDecimal128OrDefault(value, 1) WHERE value = '99.9999';
SELECT value, result, toDecimal128OrDefault('NaN', 2, CAST('-1', 'Decimal128(2)')) AS error_handling FROM test_decimal;
